name: Jamil Viper
description:
Period Cramp Simulation gooo

As you can already guess, the worst time of the month has arrived for me. And I will project my cramps onto a random character using the random name picker. Jamil got chosen.

Found this beauty on tik tok the other day.

If you ask how the hell can I still make it anypov despite it only happens to women...have you not ever think about how you can still do it for funsies (I saw a lot of videos about this, boys challenging each other or something) or think of something like you have a sister in this AU and you want to help Jamil understand Najma’s suffering each month? I made two versions for a reason, trust.

....its four, actually. In case you still want him to climb on higher levels or stop.

I reuse the Malleus’s draft on this one. Yes, I did have a Malleus draft I wrote months ago w the same reason.

More Jamil’s bots:

Timeloop AU here
